I was recruited by a local company here in Nashville that is looking to expand.

And they said, look, we, we recognize that this is not managed in the same way that our, our typical class C is managed and we don't know how to manage it and we need somebody to take on that new business.
They also so happened to be like the number one land owners in Nashville.

And so now they're trying this new division within their company and they've actually handed it to me to say, ok, lead the charge.
And I said, ok, so who are we using for this?
And they kind of all looked at me like beers in the headlights.
And I said, ok, and before I didn't know about you guys, I did know with Radi, we had gotten pricing, we'd moved through, we're in our pitch process for the first high rise.
It's gonna be 271 units.
Um It's set to deliver in, they're saying September, it's probably knowing my luck going to be December when you know, the absolute worst time to deliver units would be.

We have the interview in the pitch into February.
So by mid February, we should know if we've gained this business or not.
And I'm using that as a platform to launch and show the owners.
Um because we have 30,000 units already.
Like these are the tools that we use in class a to make us more successful, to gain those higher rents and to stay more on top of what's happening in the market.
And I'm hopeful that we can expand that further out than just my class, a mixed use stuff.
Um But for sure it would be for that.

Awesome.

So um our tool updates every single day.
So when you log into the platform, whether it's you or your site team, you know that you're looking at the most up to date and accurate information on your comps.
Um So updates every 24 hours, there's no need for any sort of manual data entry or input or anything like that.
Um You kind of touched on this earlier, but the way that we are collecting this data is uh we're pulling all of this information from property websites.
So we're giving you um basically a top down approach.
It starts at the property level all high level property data, then we move down to floor plan level data.
And then um lastly is uh the real granular unit level data that we track and to be transparent.
The way that we get the unit level data is whatever is getting pushed through the property management software um to the website through the online leasing.
That's how we're getting that uh granular unit level data.
Um And then lastly, I would say the cool thing about us as opposed to, uh, some of the different data providers like Costar Radix, whoever is that we can actually track anybody.

So if you know, you're looking at data, you know, a week old, two weeks old, three weeks old, I'll show you this later, but we track every single time that units make rate changes.
And in today's market, so many companies are, you know, changing rates daily, if not every other day.
